records.display_name: M23 SBS Benefits Summary

payload.claim_text: Improved bus speeds, reliability and quicker access to subway transfers. Improves safety in priority Vision Zero locations. Maintains through traffic and adds turn lanes where needed. Minimal effects on loading and parking.
payload.description: Summary of M23 SBS benefits
payload.subject: M23 Select Bus Service

records.display_name: Parking Changes 2nd Ave to 3rd Ave

payload.description: Maintains existing 1hr parking regulation, maintains existing school bus no standing, removes 20' of commercial loading space

records.display_name: Parking Changes Lexington Ave to 3rd Ave

payload.description: Maintains existing 1hr parking regulation, removes current rush hour restriction (8-10a, 4-6p), removes 90' of 1 hr parking

records.display_name: Bus Lane Design at Lexington Ave and 23rd St

payload.description: Offset bus lanes and left-turn restriction at Lexington Ave and 23rd St

records.display_name: 23rd Street Turn Restrictions

payload.description: Existing turn restrictions: left turns from westbound at 9th Ave, 7th Ave, 5th Ave, and EB/WB Park Ave S. Proposed additional restrictions: left turn from EB 8th Ave, left turn at Lexington Ave, left turn at Broadway, right turn at 6th Ave

records.display_name: Bus Lanes 23rd Street

payload.description: Westbound bus lanes from 1st Ave to 8th Ave; Eastbound bus lanes from 9th Ave to 2nd Ave

records.display_name: Offset Bus Lane at 1st Ave and 23rd St

payload.description: Offset bus lane at 1st Ave and 23rd St with merge transition before bus lane, maintains existing turn lane

records.display_name: Bus Lane Design at 3rd Ave and 23rd St

payload.description: Offset bus lanes and curbside bus and right-turn lanes at 3rd Ave and 23rd St, with left-turn bays

records.display_name: Consolidate Lexington Ave & 3rd Ave Stops

payload.description: Consolidate Lexington Ave and 3rd Ave bus stops - Lexington Ave offers no bus or subway connection, is 500' to Park Ave and 3rd Ave - short for local bus spacing
payload.location_text: Lexington Ave and 3rd Ave, 23rd Street, Manhattan

normalized_location.raw_text: Lexington Ave and 3rd Ave, 23rd Street, Manhattan

records.display_name: Consolidate 20th Street Stops

payload.description: Consolidate stops at 1st Ave and 20th St (approximately 450' apart - short for even local bus spacing). Likely need to lengthen stop at 1st Ave to support fare payment machine placement and improve bus turning movement

records.display_name: Parking Changes 1st Ave to 2nd Ave

payload.description: Maintains existing curb regulations, adds 20' of parking

records.display_name: Move Eastbound 1st Ave Stop to Farside

payload.description: Relocated eastbound M23 SBS 1st Ave stop to the farside (eastern) of 1st Ave. Offers closer connection to VA Hospital, Peter Cooper Village and transfers to M15. Would require moving some express bus stops to nearside (western) of 1st Ave

records.display_name: Bus Lane Design at 2nd Ave and 23rd St

payload.description: Offset bus lanes on both north and south sides of 2nd Ave, curbside bus and right-turn lane on 23rd St, pedestrian safety island, dedicated left-turn bay
